one_line: Added a 4th DATA rule (block drain/cordon when last_ready_node_op==True) over rex/harness_synth's existing-but-unused feature; it pushes HELD-OUT accuracy from 89.7% to 94.9% (matching hand-written is_safe) with zero new false-blocks, BUT honest finding: 0 TRAIN examples activate that feature so train_score is flat (0.803->0.800) and the Thompson/haiku search provably cannot discover it — the gain is a human-injected fix to an OOD coverage gap, not a synthesis improvement; remaining 2 held-out misses are unlearnable trap_actions is_safe also misses.
